import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Star, Leaf, HeartPulse, Sparkles, Truck } from 'lucide-react'; import './Product.css'; const productDatabase = { 'desi-gud': { title: 'Desi Gud', tag: 'ARTISANAL CHOICE', description: 'Hand-crafted chemical-free jaggery blocks from the heart of sugarcane belts.', price: 349.00, originalPrice: 499.00, discount: '30% OFF', reviews: 128, images: ['/images/desi-gud-main.png', '/images/desi-gud-thumb1.png', '/images/desi-gud-thumb2.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Iron Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] }, 'desi-ghee': { title: 'Sona Desi Ghee', tag: 'PURE A2 GHEE', description: 'Traditional bilona churned ghee from happy A2 cows. Rich in aroma and nutrients.', price: 1250.00, originalPrice: 1500.00, discount: '15% OFF', reviews: 350, images: ['/images/desi-ghee.png', '/images/desi-ghee.png', '/images/desi-ghee.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'A2 Milk' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Heart Healthy' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Bilona Method' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Farm Fresh' }, ] }, 'kaju-jaggery': { title: 'Kaju Jaggery', tag: 'PREMIUM BLEND', description: 'Rich, nutty jaggery infused with premium cashews for an elegant sweet treat.', price: 499.00, originalPrice: 650.00, discount: '23% OFF', reviews: 84, images: ['/images/kaju-jaggery.png', '/images/kaju-jaggery.png', '/images/kaju-jaggery.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'Premium Nuts' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Energy Boost' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Handcrafted' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] }, 'jaggery-powder': { title: 'Jaggery Powder', tag: 'VERSATILE ESSENTIAL', description: 'Fine-textured pure jaggery powder, the perfect healthy alternative to refined sugar.', price: 250.00, originalPrice: 300.00, discount: '16% OFF', reviews: 210, images: ['/images/jaggery-powder.png', '/images/jaggery-powder.png', '/images/jaggery-powder.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'Easy to dissolve' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Nutrient Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] }, 'dry-fruit-jaggery': { title: 'Dry Fruit Jaggery', tag: 'CURATED LUXURY', description: 'A decadent blend of traditional jaggery generously studded with almonds and pistachios.', price: 450.00, originalPrice: 550.00, discount: '18% OFF', reviews: 95, images: ['/images/featured-1.png', '/images/featured-1.png', '/images/featured-1.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Almonds & Pistas' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] }, 'traditional-desi-ghee': { title: 'Traditional Desi Ghee', tag: 'HERITAGE GHEE', description: 'Classic artisanal ghee housed in a beautiful traditional clay pot.', price: 1250.00, originalPrice: 1500.00, discount: '15% OFF', reviews: 412, images: ['/images/featured-2.png', '/images/featured-2.png', '/images/featured-2.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'A2 Milk' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Bilona Churned' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Clay Pot Aged' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] }, 'royal-desi-gud': { title: 'Royal Desi Gud', tag: 'CURATED LUXURY', description: 'Perfectly formed rectangular blocks of premium grade heritage jaggery.', price: 320.00, originalPrice: 400.00, discount: '20% OFF', reviews: 156, images: ['/images/featured-3.png', '/images/featured-3.png', '/images/featured-3.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Iron Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Handcrafted' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ] } }; const Product = () => { const { id } = useParams(); // Default to desi-gud if URL has unfamiliar ID const product = productDatabase[id] || productDatabase['desi-gud']; const [selectedWeight, setSelectedWeight] = useState('500g'); const [activeImage, setActiveImage] = useState(product.images[0]); // Re-sync image when navigating to a new product React.useEffect(() => { setActiveImage(product.images[0]); }, [product]); return (
{/* Left Column: Image Gallery */}
{product.tag}
{product.images.slice(1).map((img, idx) => (
setActiveImage(img)} >
))}
{/* Right Column: Product Details */}
{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
({product.reviews} Reviews)

{product.title}

{product.description}

₹{product.price.toFixed(2)} ₹{product.originalPrice.toFixed(2)} {product.discount}

SELECT WEIGHT

{product.benefits.map((benefit) => (
{benefit.icon} {benefit.text}
))}
); }; export default Product;
